A look back at the 2008 Football League Cup Final as defending champions Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur went head-to-head at the new Wembley Stadium.

It all comes down to this: Aston Villa and Manchester City go toe-to-toe for the first silverware of the season in the Carabao Cup final at Wembley. City are the reigning champions.

p.t: Best Goals of the Carabao Cup
